gaps: The prompt points to a per-Term 'Segment base rate by salience band' statpack table, but this statpack build has no such section — I had to band the CFR/split/counsel signals manually

fedcourts query citation/topic filters returned zero rows for classic antitrust anchors (Illinois Brick, Twombly, topic=antitrust), so no similar priors were retrievable

notes: Forward cell; ~7 retrieval calls total, well under budget. No outcome-revealing material encountered.
